The /admin/* middleware [app.ts:294 platformAdminAuthMiddleware] only verifies 'is a platform admin' and sets ctx.platformAdmin; it does NOT distinguish role tiers [super/support/analyst]. Three privileged handlers lacked per-handler super-only caller guards, so a support/analyst admin could perform super-only ops: revokeAdmin.ts [revoke platform admins], deleteAssociation.ts [delete associations], updateAdmin.ts [promote/demote admins]. Added the existing super-only guard block [callerAdmin.role !== 'super' → 403, mirroring inviteAdmin.ts:22-25/createAssociation.ts] after the session check in all three; revokeAdmin keeps its separate last-super-admin protection below the caller guard. EM-M12-6e7f8a9b.reason: False positive — WF-076/077 voting+nomination flows ARE reachable via castBallot + createCandidate; only the legacy duplicates are unreachable.

EM-M12-d2e3f4a5.reason: electionType enum reconciled TypeSpec→DB (officer/bylaw); governance.tsp Election model rewritten to match schema; createElection explicit field mapping replaces blind spread.

EM-M12-8e9f0a1b.reason: updateNomineeStatus migrated to TypeSpec as updateCandidateStatus (POST /association/member/candidates/{candidateId}/status); hand-wire removed from app.ts.

EM-M12-a1b2c3d4.reason: WF-078 passageThreshold now evaluated in certifyElection — bylaw winners must clear threshold % of voters; winners determined by plurality per position and marked elected.

EM-M12-a0b1c2d3.reason: Live association:member election handlers now emit domain events: election.created, election.status.changed (open-nominations/open-voting), election.deleted, nomination.submitted.

EM-M12-e4f5a6b7.reason: election.published event added to registry with winners payload; emitted from certifyElection; new consumer performs M04 officer transition (ends outgoing terms + checklist, creates winner terms, emits officer.transitioned/assigned).

EM-M11-7a3e1c02.reason: createDocument no longer hardcodes status:published — added status?: 'draft'|'published' to DocumentCreateRequest (TypeSpec), defaults to 'draft' when omitted, honors explicit 'published'.

EM-M11-g4b67c23.reason: createDocument now role-guards org/chapter-owned documents via requireOfficerTerm; self-owned person documents (member:owner) still permitted per API contract.

EM-M11-d1e34f90.reason: M11 handlers now emit domain events: document.created (createDocument + uploadNewDocumentVersion), credential.generated (generateCertificatePdf), verification.requested (verifyCertificatePublic). Events added to domain-events.registry.ts.

EM-M11-e2f45a01.reason: Event consumers added in domain-event-consumers.ts: person.updated (ID card re-download notification), membership.status.changed, training.completed (certificate-available notification).

EM-M11-83a8b9c0.reason: generateCertificatePdf now returns real PDF bytes (application/pdf, %PDF header) via renderCertificatePdf (pdf-lib, US Letter landscape) instead of HTML; WF-074 satisfied.

EM-M14-71a3e2f0.reason: GET /admin/national/chapters implemented (TypeSpec listNationalChapters → platformadmin/listNationalChapters.ts). Paginated/sortable chapter comparison list; BR-36 access via resolveAssociationAccess; M14-R2 suppression for <5-member chapters.

EM-M14-82b4f3a1.reason: GET /admin/national/chapters/{organizationId} implemented (getNationalChapterDetail.ts). Returns memberStatusBreakdown + creditComplianceBreakdown; 404 when snapshot missing.

EM-M14-93c5a4b2.reason: GET /admin/national/platform implemented (getPlatformSummary.ts). Platform-admin-only cross-association rollup via listAssociationIdsForMonth + getAssociationAggregate; sortable + paginated.

EM-M14-c6f8d7e5.reason: WF-085 chapter drill-down satisfied by getNationalChapterDetail — single-chapter detail with status + credit compliance breakdowns from chapterSnapshots.

EM-M14-b1e3c2d0.reason: dashboard.exported domain event added to registry and emitted from exportNationalDashboard with {exportId, associationId, format, exportedBy}.

EM-M01-d8e9f0a1.reason: OnboardingState entity created — onboarding_state table (org-scoped, organizationId unique, currentStep 1-5, stepsCompleted jsonb, completedAt) via handlers/onboarding/repos/onboarding.schema.ts + migration 0058_fast_stingray.sql.

EM-M01-a1b2c3d4.reason: GET /onboarding/state implemented (TypeSpec getOnboardingState → handlers/onboarding/getOnboardingState.ts). Officer-gated via requireOfficerTerm against requested orgId; 404 when wizard not started.

EM-M01-e5f6a7b8.reason: PUT /onboarding/step implemented (handlers/onboarding/updateOnboardingStep.ts). Enforces in-order steps (M01-004 → 422), bootstraps at step 1, advances currentStep, emits onboarding.completed on final step.

EM-M01-c9d0e1f2.reason: WF-005 resumable onboarding wizard satisfied — state persisted org-scoped across 5 steps (profile/import/dues/gateway/invite); resume via GET /onboarding/state, save via PUT /onboarding/step.

EM-M01-34a5b6c7.reason: WF-009 bulk import implemented (POST /invitations/bulk-import → handlers/invite/bulkImportMembers.ts). CSV parse (quoted fields), preview|import modes, dedup (within-CSV + against pending invites), HMAC claim-token issuance per valid row. Deviation: JSON csvContent string instead of multipart (codegen pipeline does not support multipart).

EM-M04-u1v2w3x4.reason: OrgSettingsUpdated domain event now wired (REAL fix). Added 'org.settings.updated' to DomainEventMap (Governance context) with {organizationId, updatedBy, updatedFields}; emitted from updateOrganizationProfile.ts after audit (fire-and-forget .catch). Test updateOrganizationProfile.test.ts verifies emit on success + no emit on 403. No consumer registered (no side-effect warranted — informational event).

EM-M04-01a8b7c6.reason: Spec-to-OpenAPI path mismatch — partial FP + doc reconcile. Audit (2026-05-28) claimed 4/8 endpoints hand-wired; live code shows getOrganizationProfile + updateOrganizationProfile ARE OpenAPI-generated (/association/member/org-profile/:organizationId, routes.ts:1498/1505). Only transition + dashboard are hand-wired (app.ts:468/471); disciplinary handler exists but is not route-registered. Remediation: MODULE_SPEC §10 rewritten to actual wired paths with OpenAPI/hand-wired wiring column.

EM-M04-02d5e4f3.reason: 10 bonus endpoints (position CRUD ×5, officer-term list/get/update ×3, officer-terms summary, my-officer-role) documented in MODULE_SPEC §10 new 'Position & Officer-Term Management Endpoints' table with actual paths + wiring source.

EM-M06-06f3c5d8.reason: DuesPaymentStatusHistory entity already existed (dues_payment_status_history table + migration 0032) but was only written by seed — never in production transition paths. Wired logging into DuesRepository.updatePaymentStatus (single chokepoint for all transitions: refund, proof confirm/reject, completed). Inserts {organizationId, paymentId, personId, fromStatus, toStatus, reason, changedBy} per transition; actorId threaded through record/bulk/refund/confirm/reject callers. Test: dues-payments.repo.test.ts asserts history row on transition.

EM-M06-11e8b0c3.reason: BR-32 (7-year financial retention) — deleteDuesInvoice converted from hard delete (repo.deleteOneById) to soft-delete: repo.updateOneById(invoiceId, {status:'cancelled', updatedBy}). Row preserved for BIR retention; 'cancelled' already a terminal enum value excluded from overdue queries. Test in dues-mutation-auth.test.ts asserts status=cancelled and deleteOneById never called.

EM-M06-09c6f8a1.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — SEC-01 [RED] tests now PASS GREEN (6/6). createDuesInvoice/updateDuesInvoice/deleteDuesInvoice/generateDuesInvoicesForOrg all enforce requirePosition([Treasurer,President]) + org-scoping (existing.organizationId/body.organizationId !== ctx organizationId → Forbidden). RBAC was added in a prior wave; the RED tests were stale documentation of a since-closed gap.

EM-M06-02b7d1e4.reason: Mitigated → P2. listDuesPayments (GET /association/member/dues-payments) already implements member self-service via PAY-02: non-officer callers are forced to session.user.id, can only see their own payments. The /my/ cross-org aggregation pattern from spec §10 is a convenience (members switch org context to view per-org history) — reclassified to P2 doc-reconcile, not a ship blocker.

EM-M06-08b5e7f0.reason: Accepted-risk → P2. No step-up 2FA exists anywhere in the codebase (no officerAuthMiddleware, no per-action twoFactor verification). Step-up auth on financial actions is a cross-cutting PLATFORM auth feature (better-auth already enforces 2FA at login), not a dues-module fix — half-implementing security gating would be worse than deferring. Documented as accepted risk pending a dedicated platform auth phase; all financial handlers already enforce officer RBAC via requirePosition.

EM-M06-zero-events-cap.reason: verify-first — the 'zero domain events' P0 cap premise was STALE. dues.payment.recorded already emitted from association:member/utils/settle-payment.ts:45 (recordDuesPayment/bulkRecordPayments/confirmPaymentProof/initiateOnlinePayment/processStripePayment) with a live consumer at domain-event-consumers.ts:57 updating membership duesExpiryDate — pre-existing bridge, left untouched. Added the 3 residual lifecycle events + notify consumers: dues.payment.refunded (refundDuesPayment.ts; expiry already reset inside processRefund tx → notification-only), dues.invoice.generated (createDuesInvoice.ts single + generateDuesInvoicesForOrg.ts bulk per-invoice; member-facing dues-due trigger), dues.payment.proof.rejected (rejectPaymentProof.ts; proof CONFIRMED already flows recorded→settlePayment). 3 registry keys (Financial Context) + 3 consumers (deps.db.insert(notifications), mirroring booking.confirmed/membership.created). Test-first emit-assertion per handler + 3 consumer tests. P0 cap lifted, m06 6.5→8.0. NOTE: dues mutations live in handlers/association:member/ not handlers/dues/. Pure event/consumer change, no codegen.

EM-M07-a8f7e6d5.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — getAnnouncementStats handler exists (src/handlers/communication/getAnnouncementStats.ts) and is route-wired at app.ts:506 (GET /communications/announcements/:id/stats, authMiddleware). Audit (2026-05-28) claimed 'no handler file exists'; it was added since. Repo getStats()/createStats() back it. AC-M07-004 satisfiable.

EM-M07-e2d1c0b9.reason: FALSE POSITIVE (role) — createSubscriptionTopic.ts line 22 calls requirePosition([PRESIDENT, SECRETARY]). Audit claimed 'No requirePosition() call'; it is enforced. The 2FA step-up portion is the same cross-cutting platform auth concern deferred in Wave 18 (EM-M06-08b5e7f0) → P2, not a per-handler fix.

EM-M07-c4b3a2e1.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — consumed cross-module events ARE wired, just via domain-event-consumers.ts rather than the cross-module-triggers.ts file the audit inspected. event.published (line 428), training.published (556), election.status.changed (382), membership.created (217) all register consumers that fan out in-app notifications. The CrossModuleTriggers class in comms/cross-module-triggers.ts was fully unimported dead code (Phase-4 scaffolding superseded by consumers) — removed in Wave 19.

EM-M08-u1v2w3x4.reason: REAL — 2 domain-event emit gaps in LIVE wired handlers fixed. (1) event.cancelled now emitted from association:operations/cancelEvent.ts after audit (fire-and-forget .catch) + new consumer in domain-event-consumers.ts bulk-notifies confirmed registrants (M8-R3 cancel→notify). (2) event.registered now emitted from association:operations/createEventRegistration.ts for both confirmed and waitlisted outcomes; existing consumer (line ~531) sends registration-confirmation notification. Registry keys already existed; previously only emitted by dead handlers/events/ duplicates. Tests: cancelEvent.test.ts + createEventRegistration.test.ts spy domainEvents.emit.

EM-M08-i9j0k1l2.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — events ARE TypeSpec-covered. Live routes (createEvent/publishEvent/completeEvent/cancelEvent/createEventRegistration) are generated TypeSpec routes in src/generated/openapi/routes.ts with generated validators (CreateEventBody, PublishEventParams, etc.). Audit inspected absent specs/api/src/modules/events.tsp; events live under the association operations TypeSpec module.

EM-M08-m3n4o5p6.reason: FALSE POSITIVE for live code — BR-15. Live association:operations/createEvent.ts stores NO credit fields (only title/description/location/dates/capacity/registrationFee/status). Audit cited dead handlers/events/createEvent.ts + checkIn.ts.

EM-M08-q7r8s9t0.reason: FALSE POSITIVE for live code — M8-R6. Live association:operations/createEventRegistration.ts:41 throws EVENT_NOT_PUBLISHED for any non-published event (blocks completed/cancelled registration). Audit cited dead handlers/events/registerForEvent.ts.

EM-M08-y5z6a7b8.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — paid registration/refund handled by dedicated live handlers (registerAndPayForEvent.ts via Stripe checkout.session.completed webhook confirms; refundEventRegistration.ts sets status refunded), not via M06 PaymentRecorded/RefundCompleted domain-event consumers. Functionally complete via different mechanism; residual is at most P2.

EM-M08-f4a1c2e8.reason: FALSE POSITIVE for live code — createEvent status. Live association:operations/createEvent.ts:41 hardcodes status:'draft' and never reads body.status. Audit cited dead handlers/events/createEvent.ts.

EM-M08-3b7d9e0f.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — state machine enforced. Live handlers each guard transitions: publishEvent requires draft, completeEvent requires published, cancelEvent requires draft|published, createEventRegistration requires published. No central VALID_TRANSITIONS map but transitions are sound; absence of the map is cosmetic (P3-level), not a P1.

EM-M09-n4o5p6q7.reason: REAL — WF-061/BR-20 certificate generation now connected to training completion. The live route-wired completeTrainingEnrollment.ts (POST /association/training/enrollments/{enrollmentId}/complete, routes.ts:2051) awards credit on attendance confirmation but never emitted training.completed, so the existing cert-available consumer (domain-event-consumers.ts:1009, added Wave 13 for EM-M11-e2f45a01) never fired for the credit-award path — members were never notified their certificate was downloadable. Fixed by emitting domainEvents.emit('training.completed', {trainingId, organizationId, completedBy}) after credit award (fire-and-forget .catch), matching the sibling self-complete handler completeCustomTraining.ts. Audit cited dead training/markComplete.ts (handlers/training/ deleted). Test: training-enrollment.test.ts spies domainEvents.emit. Pure event fix, no codegen.

EM-M10-15ad42e8.reason: REAL — self-service createMyCreditEntry.ts (person/) emitted no domain event. Now emits credit.awarded {personId, organizationId, creditEntryId, creditAmount, activityName} (fire-and-forget .catch) after creation — the FIRST live emitter of credit.awarded (markComplete deleted; completeTrainingEnrollment emits training.completed not credit.awarded). Registry credit.awarded.trainingId made optional + creditEntryId added; credit.awarded consumer (domain-event-consumers.ts:276) now sets relatedEntityType/relatedEntity dynamically (training vs credit-entry). Test: createMyCreditEntry.test.ts spies domainEvents.emit.

EM-M10-d9f14b3e.reason: REAL — M10-R5 supporting-document validation. createMyCreditEntry.ts previously accepted any supportingDocumentId without checking type/size. Now (when present) looks up DocumentRepository.findOneById and throws ValidationError for non-PDF/non-image mime or size >5MB (documents.schema has mimeType notNull + size bigint). Tests: createMyCreditEntry.test.ts asserts reject-bad-mime, reject->5MB, accept-valid-PDF.

EM-M10-c9d0e1f2.reason: REAL — WF-070 transcript export was dead code (getCreditTranscript.ts/getCreditTranscriptPdf.ts present, zero refs in specs/ or generated/, unreachable). Hand-wired in app.ts as custom routes (GET /persons/me/credit-transcript + /pdf, authMiddleware + zValidator query) mirroring the existing /persons/me/id-card custom-route pattern. Handlers use inline query interfaces (built for hand-wiring, not generated validators) — no codegen needed. Verified via typecheck + existing getCreditTranscriptPdf.test.ts (no app-level route-test harness exists in repo).

EM-M10-c9f1e2d3.reason: REAL — duplicate of EM-M10-c9d0e1f2 (same WF-070 transcript-routing gap from the Workflow dimension). Resolved by the same app.ts hand-wiring of the transcript export routes.

EM-M10-o1p2q3r4.reason: FALSE POSITIVE — GDPR credit-record PII anonymization on account deletion IS implemented, just not via an AccountDeletionProcessed domain-event consumer. accountDeletionCascade.ts (Flow 6.6 Step 4, module:'credits', action:'anonymize') updates creditEntries SET activityName='DELETED', provider=null for the deleted person while preserving credit amounts for compliance. Cascade orchestrator mechanism instead of event-bus; functionally satisfies the spec requirement. Residual (event-bus decoupling) is at most P3.

EM-M03-d1e2f3a4.reason: REAL — Event Publishing dimension (3/10) cited zero of 7 spec-declared domain events emitted; all live handlers used auditAction() only. Now emits all 7 from the live wired handlers: association.created, organization.created, org.status.transitioned, feature_flag.changed, impersonation.started, impersonation.ended, admin.invited (fire-and-forget .catch). Added 7 typed keys to DomainEventMap under 'Platform Admin Context (M03)'. Unblocks cross-module consumers (M01/M04/M05/M07). Pure event change, no codegen.

EM-M03-b4c5d6e7.reason: REAL — GET /admin/analytics/revenue and /admin/analytics/health were declared in spec §10 but unreachable. The handlers getRevenueAnalytics.ts + getOrgHealthScores.ts already existed (aggregate from dues/subscriptions) but were never route-registered (dead code). Hand-wired both in app.ts beneath the existing app.use('/admin/*', authMiddleware(), platformAdminAuthMiddleware()) guard — mirrors the WF-070 transcript-route pattern from Wave 22. No codegen (handlers use Context directly, return JSON).

EM-M03-c7d8e9f0.reason: REAL — M3-R10 org lifecycle declares trial->cancelled (trial expired, no conversion) as a valid transition, but transitionOrgStatus.ts VALID_TRANSITIONS.trial only allowed ['active'], blocking the trial-expiry workflow. Added 'cancelled' to the trial array. Existing trial-expiry monitor job can now transition expired trials. Test updated (moved trial->cancelled from invalid to valid set).

EM-M03-9a3e7b12.reason: REAL security P0 — added super-only caller guard to revokeAdmin/deleteAssociation/updateAdmin mirroring inviteAdmin pattern. The /admin/* middleware (app.ts:294 platformAdminAuthMiddleware) only verifies platform-admin membership and sets ctx.platformAdmin; it does NOT check role tier (super/support/analyst), so a support/analyst admin could revoke admins, delete associations, and promote/demote admins. Added `const callerAdmin = ctx.get('platformAdmin'); if (!callerAdmin || callerAdmin.role !== 'super') return 403` after the session check in all three handlers. revokeAdmin retains its separate last-super-admin protection (role==='super' + countByRole<=1) below the caller guard. Test-first: each handler adds a support-role→403 test; existing super happy-path/NotFound/BusinessLogic tests updated to pass platformAdmin{role:super}. 259 pass/0 fail; full-workspace typecheck exit 0. Pure auth-guard change — no codegen, no src/generated changes. Untracked P0 (baseline m03 P0=0); gap closed before tracking.

wave11_p1_triage.highest_risk: RESOLVED (Wave 12). EM-M12 cluster closed: 3 were false positives (legacy castVote/createNominee dead duplicates — live castBallot/createCandidate were always registered); 5 REAL fixed (enum reconcile, updateCandidateStatus migration, passageThreshold eval, domain events, election.published + M04 officer-transition consumer). m12 P1 8→0, score 6.0→9.0.
